name: Short River & Pond
resources: Fruit trees, flowers, rocks, river, pond
description: Standard island with a short river and pond.

name: Short River
resources: Fruit trees, flowers, rocks, short river
description: Standard island with a short river. No pond.

name: Spiral Island
resources: Fruit trees, flowers, rocks, spiral river
description: Island with a distinctive spiral river formation.

name: Large Pond Island
resources: Fruit trees, flowers, rocks, large pond
description: Island with a large central pond. Sometimes called Fidget Spinner Island.

name: Mountain Island
description: Island with a tall mountain and waterfalls. Rare flowers on top.

name: Bell Rocks Island
description: Island where all rocks produce bells. Very profitable!

name: Bamboo Island
description: Island covered entirely in bamboo. No native fruit trees.

name: Fruit Orchard
description: Island packed with a non-native fruit type. Great for fruit collecting.

name: Scorpion Island
description: Flat island with no rivers. Scorpions spawn here at night (May-Oct).

name: Tarantula Island
description: Flat island with no rivers. Tarantulas spawn here at night (Nov-Apr).

name: Rugged Woodland
description: Island covered in hardwood trees. Good for rare beetle farming.

name: Flat Woodland
description: Flat island with hardwood trees and stumps. Good for bug hunting.

name: Curly River
description: Island with a long, curving river layout.

name: Big Fish Island
description: Island with a large elevated pond. Only large-shadow fish spawn here.

name: Trash Island
description: Island where fishing only yields trash items. Useful for DIY crafting.

name: Dorsal-Fin Island
description: Island where only dorsal-fin ocean fish (sharks, etc.) spawn. Very rare!

name: Waterfalls Island
description: Island with tall cliffs and multiple waterfalls.

name: Gold Nuggets Island
description: Island where rocks drop gold nuggets. Rarest island type!
